args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(trim(c.CompanySignedDate) AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE) - CAST(CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c), '#', '') = replace(trim(c.Id), '#', '')
WHERE CAST(CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND trim(c.CompanySignedDate) <> '' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(trim(c.CompanySignedDate) AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE) - CAST(CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON replace(trim(o.ContractID__c), '#', '') = replace(trim(c.Id), '#', '')
WHERE CAST(CAST(trim(o.CreatedDate) AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND trim(c.CompanySignedDate) <> '' AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
